parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "Name of the Candidate": {{ $json.candidateName }},
  "Email": {{ $json.email }},
  "Role": {{ $json.role }},
  "Log ID": {{ $json.logId }},
  "Row ID": {{ $json.rowId }},
  "Contact Number": {{ $json.contact }},
  "CV": {{ $json.cv }},
  "Summary": {{ $json.summary }},
  "Score": {{ $json.score }},
  "Status": {{ $json.status }},
  "Interview date": {{ $json.interviewDate }},
  "Interview type": {{ $json.interviewType }},
  "Meeting link": {{ $json.meetingLink }},
  "Location": {{ $json.location }},
  "Department": {{ $json.department }},
  "Position": {{ $json.position }}
}
